summary: Chatroom app with live streaming rooms. User is refining the room header UI.

existing_features.title: In the chatroom header component, remove the LIVE badge entirely.

In the chatroom header component, move the category tag into the same row as the messages count and live viewer count, positioned to the right of the live viewer count. Do not change any styles on the category tag or any other elements.

new_feature_requests.summary: Move category tag to the right of the live viewer count in the same row, and remove the LIVE badge from the chatroom header. No style changes.
